the Respondent No.2 permitted the petitioner to appear for

6.3. 
It is submitted that the Respondent No.4 / Bihar Staff Selection 
Commission is governed by section 8 of the Bihar Staff 
Selection Commission Act, 2002, which requires it to formulate 
procedure for selection for different services/posts with prior
